mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MEMBER_TBL ( MEMBER_ID, MEMBER_PW, MEMBER_NAME, MEMBER_PHONE, MEMBER_THUMB, MEMBER_EMAIL, MEMBER_ADDRCODE, MEMBER_ADDR, MEMBER_DETAIL_ADDR, MEMBER_GRADE, MEMBER_POINT, ENROLL_DATE, MEMBER_STATUS ) VALUES ( #{memberId}, #{memberPw}, #{memberName}, #{memberPhone}, NULL, #{memberEmail}, NULL, NULL, NULL, 1, 0, SYSDATE, 1 )
